summary: Verified live Claude-to-Codex orchestration end-to-end with a documentation-only change. Codex CLI (invoked as the batch worker) added a concise 'Live orchestration verified' note to docs/claude_codex_batch_orchestrator.md and a matching entry to docs/progress.md. Claude reviewed both diffs against the allowed/forbidden path list, ran all configured validation commands, and removed two out-of-scope scratch review files Claude had created outside the approved path set (again via Codex, since Claude's own Edit/Bash grants in this session are scoped to Codex invocation, git diff, validation commands, and this result file only).

validation.notes: Production build succeeded; only the existing non-blocking large-chunk warning was emitted.
No whitespace or conflict-marker errors; only advisory LF-to-CRLF line-ending warnings were printed.
